_comment: Seed registry for the Peregrine plugin marketplace. Copy this file to the root of the Knaox/peregrine-plugins GitHub repo (branch main) so that Peregrine panels fetching https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Knaox/peregrine-plugins/main/registry.json can discover available plugins.

plugins.name: Server Invitations
plugins.description: Invite users to your servers by email with granular Pelican permissions. Edit permissions of active subusers and pending invitations. Ships with Peregrine by default. Admin-aware — panel admins can manage invitations / subusers on any server.
plugins.author: Peregrine Team

plugins.name: Egg Config Editor
plugins.description: Auto-detects parameters in your server's game config files (server.properties, GameUserSettings.ini, PalWorldSettings.ini, …) and translates known keys via the plugin's own i18n dictionary. Admin only declares which file to expose for which egg; everything else is data-driven. Ships preinstalled with Peregrine. Bundles 145+ ARK / Minecraft / Palworld parameter labels in EN + FR; unknown keys are auto-humanised so the UI never shows raw camelCase.
plugins.author: Peregrine Team
